name: Dashboard UI
objective: Build tenant dashboard for MCU credit balance, usage analytics, and API key management
description: Create React dashboard where tenants can view credit balance, usage history, manage API keys, and top-up credits. Integrate with Polar.sh checkout for purchases.
success_criteria: Dashboard shows current MCU credit balance
Usage charts display credit consumption over time
API key CRUD operations (create, revoke, rename)
Top-up button redirects to Polar.sh checkout
